ibitlabs._comment: Install first with `pip install -e path/to/ibitlabs-public/mcp-server`. On macOS this config file lives at ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json. Restart Claude Desktop after editing. Six read-only tools (get_live_status, get_position, get_recent_trades, get_shadow_fires, list_days, get_day) appear in the tool picker.
